metadata.description: Homen Shum's Claude Code skills: ChatGPT cross-thread consultation, agentic UI QA, diagramming, and readable submissions.

plugins.name: graph-hop
plugins.description: Drive your ChatGPT threads from Claude Code over Chrome CDP. Route reasoning effort, consult one thread or fan a question across many, and synthesize agreement, contradiction, and novel findings into a verdict.

plugins.name: agentic-ui-qa
plugins.description: Universal QA and dogfooding protocol for agentic application UIs: drives the UI end to end as personas, verifies every claim with artifacts, scores against the Agentic UI Bar, and runs a bounded fix-revamp loop.

plugins.name: drawio-skill
plugins.description: Generate diagrams, flowcharts, architecture and UML/ER figures, and mind maps as .drawio XML, exported locally via the native draw.io CLI to PNG/SVG/PDF.

plugins.name: easier-to-read-submissions
plugins.description: Make every commit, branch, and PR easier for the next person to read: per-surface changelog entries and, when UI changed, a verified demo recording.
